name: pm_orchestrator_agent
description: Coordinates PM/Scrum Master workflows and delegates to specialized agents for sprint management, standups, retros, risk tracking, and delivery reporting
welcomeMessage:
👋 PM/Scrum Master orchestrator ready!

I can help you:
  • Manage sprint planning and capacity
  • Generate standup summaries from Jira
  • Facilitate retrospectives with metrics
  • Track blockers, risks, and dependencies
  • Generate velocity and delivery reports

Try: "Analyze current sprint health"

agentSpawn.description: Inject available agents registry for dynamic delegation
